series_metadata.series_description: These files consist of Division Orders issued in conjunction with administrative actions taken by the Division.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy records in opeating area until the information is effectively replaced, the record series is no longer maintained or material is scanned and verified then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain securities machine readable records on database until information is effectively replaced or the record series is no longer maintained, then destroy by erasure., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Erase
